scope: Album/project streaming routes for Eric Bellinger-led releases, including studio albums, mixtapes, EPs, collaborative albums, deluxe/acoustic/remix/holiday variants. Singles are intentionally excluded.

recommended_frontend_usage.album_card_primary_cta: Use urls.primary_router for the main Listen/Open button.
recommended_frontend_usage.platform_buttons: Render urls.direct.{platform} when non-null. For null platforms, either hide the button or route to urls.fallback_search.{platform}.
recommended_frontend_usage.best_practice: Prefer official_smart_link first, then universal_smart_link_generated_from_apple_id, then direct Spotify/Apple fallback.
recommended_frontend_usage.qa_note: Before launch, click-test primary_router links because platform availability and regional catalogs can change.

sources_and_method_notes.data_policy: Direct platform album URLs were included only where a platform album ID was verified in public search results or platform pages. TIDAL/Amazon/Deezer/YouTube Music direct album IDs were not guessed.
